3169170.name: Songs of Solace
3169170.description: Defeat enemy monsters in melee combats , explore the maps for new weapons and items and trade in items shop in this ACTION RPG game. The hero wakes up in a strange land in a state of amnesia. He must get stronger and  find out more about himself and his true purpose and return to his true home . Gradually level up by defeating monsters and doing various quests. This game will contain everything that is in a RPG strategy game.
3169170.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
